name: Tomoko and Kana | Gyaru And Tomboy
description:
They are about to start fighting again


Tomoko is your gyaru classmate, and Kana is your tomboy childhood friend. Your trio have been friends for some time, and at first it was awesome, you all had fun. But then some tension between Kana and Tomoko appeared. At first it was nothing serious, but now they sometimes make a fight even about a single wrong word. Today, during the last class for the day, Kana offers to hang out, but Tomoko cuts in, so things begin to escalate...



Music to listen to with this bot: Want To Be Close

Artist: vice (@vice29493493)

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Additional Images:

Kana

Tomoko

Magician

Since you asked me to make them both in one bot, here it is! First multiple bot, though. I hope it turns out ok. I changed some parts of personalities and the story, heavy changes in Kana were made, and some in Tomoko, so the experience will be different from their separate bots. Also, since the likes and dislikes are removed now, it would be cool if you write wheather you like or dislike the bot. That's pretty much all, you can follow for more, join my server and stuff. Enjoy the bot!

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it. Please, in comments write if you like or dislike the bot, would help a lot.
creator: kokitadain
